sentences.arabic: يَشْتَغِلُ غَسَّانُ كَنَفَانِي فِي رِوَايَاتِهِ عَلَى زَمَنٍ مُرَكَّبٍ يَتَداخَلُ فِيهِ الذَّاتِيُّ والتَّارِيخِيُّ والأُسْطُورِيُّ بِطَرِيقَةٍ تَجْعَلُ مِنَ الفَقْدِ الفَرْدِيِّ اسْتِعَارَةً لِلنَّكْبَةِ الجَمَاعِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ghassan Kanafani u romanima operira složenim vremenom u kojemu se subjektivno, historijsko i mitološko isprepliću na način koji individualni gubitak pretvara u metaforu za kolektivnu katastrofu.
sentences.translationEn: Ghassan Kanafani's novels work with a complex temporality in which the subjective, the historical and the mythological interweave in a manner that transforms individual loss into a metaphor for collective catastrophe.
